Rule: split the `4x8` input into two `4x4` panels and mark output cell `4` exactly where both panels have `0`; everything else stays `0`. The Opus summary hint was used because it matched all official examples. The generator in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e345f17b/generator.py#L17) builds a shared hole set plus panel-specific extra holes, so the output is the latent shared-hole mask, while panel fill counts stay in the observed `6..12` range. No new primitive was needed.

Validation passed: official verifier `6/6`, build produced `1000` examples, generated-example verification `1000/1000`, and the preview sheet looked on-family against the originals.
